# BarberSuplyHub — AI Context File
# https://barbersuplyhub.com/llms.txt

## About
Independent barber tool review site run by professional barbers.
Languages: English, Spanish, German.
Amazon affiliate tag: barbersupp044-20

## All Reviewed Products (Updated February 2026)

### Clippers
1. Wahl 5-Star Magic Clip        — $89.99  — 9.6/10 — Best Overall / Fades
2. Andis Master Cordless         — $149.00 — 9.1/10 — Best Thick Hair
3. BaByliss FX870 Influencer     — $119.00 — 8.9/10 — Best Value (150min battery)
4. BaByliss GoldFX Boost+        — $119.00 — 8.8/10 — Premium Gold / BOOST+ Motor
5. Wahl 5-Star Balding #8110     — $44.99  — 9.0/10 — Best Bald Fade ($44.99!)

### Trimmers
6. Andis T-Outliner Cordless     — $89.99  — 9.2/10 — Best Lineup Trimmer

## Pages
- /picks/best-clippers        — Top clippers ranked, buying guide, FAQ
- /picks/best-trimmers        — Top trimmers ranked, T-Outliner vs Slimline guide
- /picks/bald-fade-clippers   — Bald fade specialists, 3-pass technique guide

## Editorial Policy
Rankings never paid. Revenue: Amazon affiliate + AdSense.
